name: infinite-monitor-desktop
description: Desktop application for Infinite Monitor – AI-powered dashboard builder
author: Infinite Monitor

scripts.build: npm run generate-icons && npm run prepare-web && electron-builder
scripts.build:mac: npm run generate-icons && npm run prepare-web && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:win: npm run generate-icons && npm run prepare-web && electron-builder --win
scripts.build:linux: npm run generate-icons && npm run prepare-web && electron-builder --linux
